item.title: Eli Lilly / Kelonia Therapeutics Acquisition
item.description:
• Summary: Eli Lilly has agreed to acquire Kelonia Therapeutics for up to $7 billion, with $3.25 billion upfront, to bolster its in vivo CAR-T therapy pipeline for multiple myeloma. The deal underscores Lilly's strategy in gene delivery technology for cell therapies without ex vivo manipulation.
  • MoAs: N/A
  • Sources: STAT News, BioPharma Dive, BioSpace, Fierce Biotech, Endpoints News, ApexOnco

item.title: Biogen Deals & Strategy
item.description:
• Summary: Biogen is actively pursuing deals, including a $100 million payment for antibody rights from a Merck partner and an $850 million biobucks deal for China rights to a late-stage immune antibody. The company also engaged in marketing with the Durham Bulls baseball team.
  • MoAs: N/A
  • Sources: Endpoints News, Fierce Biotech, Fierce Pharma

item.title: Odyssey Therapeutics IPO
item.description:
• Summary: Odyssey Therapeutics is planning an initial public offering (IPO) after previously abandoning plans, aiming to capitalize on a warmer market for biotech investments.
  • MoAs: N/A
  • Sources: Fierce Biotech, Endpoints News

item.title: Viatris Xanax Recall
item.description:
• Summary: Viatris has issued a recall for its extended-release formulation of Xanax (alprazolam) due to a dissolution test failure, potentially affecting product efficacy. The move highlights manufacturing quality control issues in the pharmaceutical supply chain.
  • MoAs: Alprazolam (Xanax) is a benzodiazepine that enhances GABA-A receptor activity, producing anxiolytic and sedative effects.
  • Sources: BioSpace

item.title: Boehringer Ingelheim AI Investment
item.description:
• Summary: Boehringer Ingelheim is expanding its artificial intelligence capabilities with a £150 million investment in the UK, aiming to enhance drug discovery and development processes. This move underscores the growing integration of AI in biopharmaceutical R&D.
  • MoAs: N/A
  • Sources: Endpoints News

item.title: Biovac Vaccine Plant Financing
item.description:
• Summary: Biovac has secured a $108 million finance package to build Africa's first fully integrated vaccine manufacturing plant. This investment aims to bolster regional vaccine production capacity and pandemic preparedness.
  • MoAs: N/A
  • Sources: Fierce Pharma

item.title: Theramex Compliance Exit
item.description:
• Summary: Theramex, a pharmaceutical company, has exited a self-regulatory body following systemic compliance failures. This move highlights ongoing challenges in regulatory adherence within the industry.
  • MoAs: N/A
  • Sources: Fierce Pharma

item.title: Johnson & Johnson vs Bayer Advertising Case
item.description:
• Summary: A judge has supported Johnson & Johnson's false advertising case against Bayer, rejecting Bayer's claims in a dispute related to prostate cancer treatments. This legal outcome could impact marketing strategies in the oncology space.
  • MoAs: N/A
  • Sources: Fierce Pharma

item.title: Andrew Baum Leaves Pfizer
item.description:
• Summary: Andrew Baum has left his post at Pfizer, marking a leadership change within the company.
  • MoAs: N/A
  • Sources: STAT News
